_doc: Data synthesis control — canonical/ is the single source of truth

GAME.notes: 7 eval-active games only. D7 HIGH-tier gin_rummy merged (275 entries). All messages normalized to (role, content) schema.
GAME.audit: 2026-03-19: D7 merge complete. gin_rummy 505→780 (+275 HIGH-tier). Total 2916. Distribution: goofspiel 1050, gin_rummy 780, leduc_poker 428, liars_dice 333, hex 190, clobber 123, othello 12.

NAVWORLD.notes: Schema normalized: tool_calls flattened to <tool_call> tags in content. D8 Phase 1 diversity generation running (8 types x 50 = 400 new Chinese entries).
NAVWORLD.audit: 2026-03-19: schema fix — removed tool_calls/tool_call_id fields, flattened to (role, content). D8 Phase 1 in progress.

SWE-SYNTH.notes: Fully cleaned: 368 think-tag entries removed (334 with <think>, 34 with </think> only). Canonical replaced 2026-03-18. seq=8192 needed for most entries.
SWE-SYNTH.audit: 2026-03-18: 983 clean entries, 0 think tags. Original 1351 → removed 368 contaminated.

LIVEWEB.notes: Canonical replaced with 18 short entries (<16K chars). Upstream compression needed for real improvement.

LGC-v2.notes: RE-INCLUDED per Strategist D9 directive. Quality: 1500 entries, all have env=LGC-v2, score present, last_msg=assistant. Issue: only 2 msgs per entry (no system prompt). Schema: (role, content) OK.
LGC-v2.audit: 2026-03-19: D9 verified. 1500 entries, 2-msg format (user+assistant), no system prompt.

PRINT.notes: RE-INCLUDED per Strategist D9 directive. Quality: 1500 entries, all have env=PRINT, score present, last_msg=assistant. Issue: only 2 msgs per entry (no system prompt). Schema: (role, content) OK.
PRINT.audit: 2026-03-19: D9 verified. 1500 entries, 2-msg format (user+assistant), no system prompt.

MEMORYGYM.notes: Not on leaderboard. Excluded from v1.

v2_data_summary._note: 4-env only. LGC-v2/PRINT excluded (not active). GAME includes bot strategy expansion.

v3_staging._note: gin_rummy 275 HIGH-tier merged to canonical. goofspiel 150 + leduc 18 approved, pending merge.

d8_navworld_phase1._note: All Chinese prompts. Unique tool call IDs. 8 diverse query types.

schema_fix: 2026-03-19: ALL envs normalized to (role, content) only. NAVWORLD tool_calls flattened to <tool_call> tags.
